{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Director
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|There is a slug-shaped [[Director]] who may have distracted [[Magic Tower security]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c23">''The Captain'', chapter 23</ref>}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|The [[Director]] is a hooded silhouette.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c2">''The Pilot'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
